title: Mandala's GUI - Dark mode - Utopia extension
description: 95 mods compat for Mandala's GUI - Dark mode
body:
Required Mandala's GUI - Dark mode

Other than 950 GUI available, 95 mods for now !

This addon was originally made for 1.20.1 to be compatible with the modpack Create Building Utopia.

Available mods for 1.21+ (neoforge) have been tested (04/04/25) (Compatible with Holycube Revolution).

Other version than 1.20.1-1.21.5 should work but I didn't test them. (This version are supported on ask, i'll upload if your ask for it)
Feel free to report problems and make suggestions.

This mod was originaly uploaded on cursefroge, when mandala didn't supported mods. Some mods are know support in the native Mandala ressource pack.
